name: agent-ops
description: Operational helper skills for repository docs, notes, prompts, and PDF work.

interface.shortDescription: Keep agent work documented and portable.
interface.longDescription: Agent Ops packages practical operating skills for creating AGENTS.md files, refreshing READMEs, saving local notes, drafting copy-ready prompts, and working with PDFs when rendering and layout matter.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Ops to document a repo, save a note, draft a prompt, or work with a PDF.
